title: Phase tracking reference signal transmission for physical uplink shared channel reliability enhancement
abstract: The present application relates to devices and components including apparatus, systems, and methods for physical uplink shared channel transmissions with repetitions on different transmit beams with phase tracking reference signals.
claims: 1. A method comprising: processing downlink control information (DCI) to identify a first value in a first phase-tracking reference signal (PTRS)-demodulation reference signal (DMRS) association field and a second value in a second PTRS-DMRS association field; determining, based on the first value, a first PTRS-DMRS association for a first sounding reference signal resource indicator (SRI) or precoding information; determining, based on the second value, a second PTRS-DMRS association 9 for a second SRI or precoding information; generating a first PUSCH repetition based on the first SRI or precoding information; and generating a second PUSCH repetition based on the second SRI or precoding information.
